ingredients: 1 each Bread - Pub Egg Wash Buns|1 each Meat - Beef Burger Patty Ea|1 each Produce - Burger Lettuce|1 each Prep Sliced Tomato|1 1/2 tsp Prep Burger Seasoning|1 fl oz Prep Kiwanda Cream Aioli|1 each Prep Sliced Cheddar Cheese|2 Tbsp Dairy - Butter Bulk Unsalted|1 fl oz Prep Sea n Red Bobby-Q Sauce|1 oz Prep Fried Onions
cook_steps: Season both sides of a burger patty evenly with burger seasoning.|Place on a grill and cook to desired doneness.
